title: Unlock vault and reach the main workspace
description: This verifies that entering the correct master password opens the vault and loads the main workspace with the notebook tree, note list, and editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Verify the main workspace is displayed
Verify the notebook tree, note list, and editor are displayed

title: Open the editor and autosave an edit
description: This verifies that a user can select a note, edit its content in the rich text editor, and see the save state return to saved after the change.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Click a note in the note list
Type additional content into the editor
Wait briefly for auto-save to complete
Verify the editor shows the note content and the save state indicates the note is saved

title: Edit a note and keep the changes after auto-save
description: This verifies that editing a note in the rich text editor persists the update and the changed note remains available in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Select a notebook in the tree
Select a note in the note list
Type a short update into the editor
Verify the edited note content is shown in the editor
Verify the note remains present in the note list

title: Show the saved state after brief idle editing
description: This verifies that after a user edits a note and pauses, the editor indicates the note has been saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Click a note in the note list
Type a short edit into the editor
Wait briefly without making further changes
Verify the save indicator shows the note is saved

title: Create a new vault from the unlock screen
description: This verifies that a user can open the create-vault flow, enter matching passwords, create a vault, and reach the main workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the create vault flow
Fill in the new password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the confirm password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create the vault
Verify the main workspace is displayed
Verify the notebook tree, note list, and editor are displayed

title: Select a notebook and view its notes
description: This verifies that choosing a notebook updates the note list for that notebook in the main workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Select a notebook in the tree
Verify the note list updates for the selected notebook
Verify notes are displayed for the selected notebook

title: Create a note in the selected notebook
description: This verifies that creating a note adds it to the current notebook and opens it in the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Select a notebook in the tree
Create a new note
Verify the new note appears in the note list
Verify the note opens in the editor

title: Open an existing note from the note list
description: This verifies that selecting a note loads its content into the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Select a notebook in the tree
Select a note in the note list
Verify the selected note opens in the editor
Verify note content is displayed in the editor

title: Find a note by search and open it
description: This verifies that a user can search across notes and open a matching result in the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Open the search modal
Type a search query into the search field
Select a matching search result
Verify the matching note opens in the editor

title: Reject an incorrect master password
description: This verifies that submitting a wrong master password keeps the vault locked and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with an invalid password
Submit the unlock form
Verify the vault remains locked
Verify a password error message is visible

title: Create a notebook in the tree
description: This verifies that a user can create a new notebook and see it appear in the notebook tree.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Create a new notebook
Verify the new notebook appears in the tree
Verify the notebook is available for selection

title: Format selected note text from the toolbar
description: This verifies that a user can apply rich text formatting to selected note content and see the formatting reflected in the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Click a note in the note list
Select text in the editor
Apply a formatting option from the toolbar
Verify the selected text is shown with the applied formatting

title: Create a note with quick create
description: This test verifies that a user can quickly create a note, choose a target notebook, and see the new note open in the editor and appear in the note list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the vault password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vault unlock form
Open the quick create modal
Fill in the note title field with Quick create note
Optionally fill in the note content field with Quick create content
Select a target notebook
Create the note
Verify the new note appears in the note list and is open in the editor

title: Create a child notebook under an existing notebook
description: This verifies that a user can create a nested notebook and see it appear under its parent.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Open a notebook context menu
Create a child notebook
Verify the nested notebook appears under its parent
Verify the parent notebook remains expanded

title: Delete a note from the current notebook
description: This verifies that deleting a note removes it from the current note list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Select a notebook in the tree
Open a note context menu
Delete the note
Verify the note is removed from the note list
Verify the current notebook still shows its remaining notes

title: Save a filesystem sync configuration
description: This verifies that a user can configure local folder sync and save the settings successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Navigate to /settings
Select the filesystem sync provider
Fill in a valid local folder path
Save the sync configuration
Verify the filesystem sync configuration is saved

title: Rename a notebook from its context menu
description: This verifies that renaming a notebook updates its title in the tree.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Open a notebook context menu
Rename the notebook
Verify the notebook title is updated in the tree
Verify the renamed notebook remains visible

title: Create a note with title only
description: This test verifies that a user can create a note using quick create with only a title and still see the note created successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the vault password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vault unlock form
Open the quick create modal
Fill in the note title field with Title only note
Select a target notebook
Create the note
Verify the new note is created and visible in the note list

title: Insert an image into a note
description: This verifies that a user can add an image to a note and see it appear in the editor content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Click a note in the note list
Paste an image into the editor
Verify the image is inserted into the note content

title: Keep the selected notebook when creating a quick note
description: This test verifies that a user can choose a specific notebook in quick create and have the note created in that notebook.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the vault password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vault unlock form
Open the quick create modal
Fill in the note title field with Notebook-targeted note
Select a target notebook
Create the note
Verify the note is created inside the selected notebook

title: Pin a note to the top of the list
description: This verifies that pinning a note moves it to the pinned section at the top of the current note list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Select a notebook in the tree
Open a note context menu
Pin the note
Verify the note appears in the pinned section
Verify the note is shown above unpinned notes

title: Reorder notes within a notebook
description: This verifies that dragging a note changes the order of notes in the current list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Select a notebook in the tree
Drag a note to a new position
Verify the note list order changes
Verify the moved note remains visible in the list

title: Show fuzzy search matches for a partial query
description: This verifies that a user can search with a partial term and still see relevant fuzzy matches appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Open the search modal
Type a partial search term into the search field
Verify relevant fuzzy search results are displayed

title: Save a Nextcloud sync configuration
description: This verifies that a user can configure Nextcloud sync details and save the settings successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Navigate to /settings
Select the Nextcloud sync provider
Fill in a server URL
Save the sync configuration
Verify the Nextcloud sync configuration is saved

title: Unpin a note and return it to normal order
description: This verifies that unpinning a note removes it from the pinned section and restores normal list ordering.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Select a notebook in the tree
Open a pinned note context menu
Unpin the note
Verify the note is no longer in the pinned section
Verify the note returns to the regular note list order

title: Toggle spell check while editing a note
description: This verifies that a user can turn spell check on or off in the editor and observe the spelling behavior change.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Click a note in the note list
Toggle spell check in the editor
Verify the editor reflects the spell check setting change

title: View deleted items in trash
description: This test verifies that a user can open the trash view from the main workspace and see deleted items listed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the vault password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vault unlock form
Open the trash view from the sidebar
Verify deleted items are displayed in the trash view

title: Create a vault with mismatched passwords
description: This verifies that mismatched create-vault passwords are rejected and the vault is not created.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the create vault flow
Fill in the new password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the confirm password field with a different password
Create the vault
Verify the vault creation form remains visible
Verify a password mismatch error is visible

title: Use editor context menu actions on note content
description: This verifies that a user can open the editor context menu and use editing actions such as cut, copy, or paste to change note content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Click a note in the note list
Open the editor context menu
Choose an editing action from the context menu
Verify the note content changes as expected after the editor action

title: Restore a deleted item from trash
description: This test verifies that a user can restore a deleted item from trash and see it return to its original location.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the vault password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vault unlock form
Open the trash view from the sidebar
Select a deleted item
Restore the selected item
Verify the item is removed from trash and visible in its original location

title: Test a WebDAV connection before saving
description: This verifies that a user can enter WebDAV settings, run the connection test, and see the test result state in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Navigate to /settings
Select the WebDAV sync provider
Fill in a server URL
Fill in the WebDAV credentials
Run the connection test
Verify the WebDAV connection test result is displayed

title: Permanently delete a trashed item
description: This test verifies that a user can permanently delete a trashed item and see it removed from trash.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the vault password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vault unlock form
Open the trash view from the sidebar
Select a deleted item
Permanently delete the selected item
Verify the item is no longer displayed in trash

title: Run manual sync from settings
description: This verifies that a user can trigger a manual sync and see the sync progress complete in the settings view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Navigate to /settings
Click sync now
Wait for sync progress to complete
Verify the sync completion state is displayed

title: Handle quick create with missing required title
description: This test verifies that the quick create form prevents note creation when the title is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the vault password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vault unlock form
Open the quick create modal
Select a target notebook
Create the note
Verify a validation error is visible and the note is not created

title: Collapse and expand a notebook branch
description: This verifies that collapsing a notebook hides its children and expanding it shows them again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the master password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Expand a notebook with children
Collapse the notebook branch
Expand the notebook branch again
Verify the child notebooks are hidden when collapsed
Verify the child notebooks reappear when expanded

title: Show an empty state when search finds nothing
description: This verifies that a user receives a clear empty result state when a search query has no matches.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Open the search modal
Type a unique search query with no expected matches into the search field
Verify an empty search result state is displayed

title: Show available notebooks in quick create
description: This test verifies that the quick create modal lets a user choose from existing notebooks before creating a note.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the vault password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vault unlock form
Open the quick create modal
Open the notebook selector
Verify available notebooks are displayed for selection

title: Validate required sync fields before saving
description: This verifies that a user sees validation feedback when trying to save sync settings without the required provider-specific values.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vault access credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vault password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the unlock form
Navigate to /settings
Select a sync provider
Leave the required sync fields empty
Save the sync configuration
Verify sync field validation errors are displayed
